tips.context: Distance-based polymer context (viewport pick or sequence)
tips.interactions: Protein–nucleic distance lines in the picked context (requires DNA/RNA + residue pick).
tips.nucleicAccent: Thin backbone lines on nucleic residues in the picked context.
tips.readable: Readable preset: cartoon + chain colors + clear isolate
tips.structureAnalysis: Analyze the full loaded structure with AI (fold, domains, assembly, chains)
tips.measure: Cycle distance / angle / dihedral. Pick atoms in the viewport; click the last atom again to confirm.
tips.quality: Cycle renderer quality (Low / Med / High). Rebuilds structure meshes.

bottomStrip.overlayNeedsPick: Ixn/Nt · pick a residue to show overlays
bottomStrip.pickHint: Pick: click atom / residue in viewport

measurementActive.distance: Distance: pick 2 atoms, then click the 2nd atom again to confirm.
measurementActive.angle: Angle: pick 3 atoms, then click the 3rd atom again to confirm.
measurementActive.dihedral: Dihedral: pick 4 atoms, then click the 4th atom again to confirm.

toasts.overlayNeedsPick: Pick a viewport residue first — overlays only appear around the active context.
toasts.overlayNoNucleic: No DNA/RNA chains in this structure — interaction and nucleic overlays need nucleic polymers.
toasts.overlayNoPairsInContext: No protein–nucleic heavy-atom pairs within the current context radius.
toasts.overlayLinesOn: Showing distance lines for {{count}} candidate pair(s) in context.
toasts.nucleicAccentOnDetail: Backbone accent on {{count}} nucleic residue(s) in context.
toasts.nucleicAccentNoContext: No nucleic residues in the current context radius.
